title: デビュー戦の後に・狼煙を上げろ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin does a fantastic job in her debut
race, but her journey has only just begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's to be seen as a fully capable racer, she'll
have to overcome one of the toughest challenges
out there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She makes the Classic Triple Crown her main goal
for next year, and to better prepare for it, we
decide for her to run in the Hopeful Stakes.
